title: Resinous Venezuelan Christmas Pudding Solo Dinner
description: A crispy, whole30-friendly Venezuelan dish featuring Christmas pudding, kombu cold-extract, perfect for a solo Christmas dinner.
instructions: Soak the dried kombu in water for at least 30 minutes.
Cut the Christmas pudding into 1-inch cubes.
Heat the coconut oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add the Christmas pudding cubes and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the pudding from the skillet and set aside.
Add the salt and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the soaked kombu to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the Christmas pudding to the skillet and stir to combine.
Sprinkle the crushed plantain chips and coconut flakes on top of the pudding.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
